creator: delphij@delphij.net
text:
Hi,

Here is a proposed combined patchset with a couple of plist fixes.

By the way, based on the information received by the security team and
our evaluation, there alleged security issue does not exist so no vuxml
entry will be added for now.

Cheers,
--

FreeBSD - The Power to Serve!		Live free or die
